message:
chore(deps): bump arrow + parquet 54.3.0 → 58.1.0 (4 major versions)

Major-version jump of the Arrow ecosystem for fp-io. Includes
coordinated transitive updates:
- arrow / arrow-* sub-crates 54.3.1 → 58.1.0 (12 crates in lockstep)
- parquet 54.3.1 → 58.1.0
- flatbuffers 24.12.23 → 25.12.19
- twox-hash 1.6.3 → 2.1.2
- Removed stale transitives: bitflags 1.x, num 0.4, num-iter,
  num-rational, static_assertions (upstream modernization).

fp-io public usage surface unchanged across the jump:
- `arrow::array::{Array, Int32Array, Float32Array, LargeStringArray,
   Int64Array}` — stable
- `arrow::datatypes::{DataType, Field, Schema, TimeUnit,
   Date32Type, Date64Type, TimestampSecondType/Milli/Micro/Nano}` — stable
- `arrow::temporal_conversions::{as_date, as_datetime}` — stable
- `arrow::ipc::{writer::FileWriter, writer::StreamWriter,
   reader::FileReader, reader::StreamReader}` — stable
- `arrow::error::ArrowError` — stable
- `parquet::arrow::{ArrowWriter, arrow_reader::ParquetRecordBatchReaderBuilder}` — stable
- Feature flags `["prettyprint", "ipc"]` (arrow) and `["arrow", "snap"]`
  (parquet) still valid in 58.1.

Verification:
- `rch exec -- cargo check --workspace --all-targets` → OK
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-io --lib` → 192 passed, 0 failed
  (covers Parquet round-trip, Feather, IPC stream/file, Arrow
  dtype inference, datetime conversion — all green).
- `rch exec -- cargo test -p fp-conformance --lib` → 334 passed,
  18 failed (same pre-existing env-dependent packet/CI failures as
  baseline on main; arrow/parquet jump did NOT regress conformance).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.7 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
